mapper.select:
SELECT f.id, f.customer_id, f.type, f.house_id, h.project_name AS house_title, CONCAT_WS(' ', h.city, h.district, h.building_no, h.unit_no, h.room_no) AS house_address, f.sales_id, u.real_name AS sales_name, f.customer_feedback, f.new_intention_level, f.view_time AS follow_date, f.status, f.follow_advice, f.cancel_reason, f.create_time FROM tb_view_record f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.sales_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_house h ON f.house_id = h.id
f.is_deleted = 0
AND f.customer_id = #{customerId}
ORDER BY f.view_time DESC

SELECT f.id, f.customer_id, f.type, f.house_id, h.project_name AS house_title, CONCAT_WS(' ', h.city, h.district, h.building_no, h.unit_no, h.room_no) AS house_address, f.sales_id, u.real_name AS sales_name, f.customer_feedback, f.new_intention_level, f.view_time AS follow_date, f.status, f.follow_advice, f.cancel_reason, f.create_time FROM tb_view_record f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.sales_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_house h ON f.house_id = h.id WHERE f.customer_id = #{customerId} AND f.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY f.view_time DESC

SELECT f.id, f.customer_id, f.type, f.house_id, h.project_name AS house_title, CONCAT_WS(' ', h.city, h.district, h.building_no, h.unit_no, h.room_no) AS house_address, f.sales_id, u.real_name AS sales_name, f.customer_feedback, f.new_intention_level, f.view_time AS follow_date, f.status, f.follow_advice, f.cancel_reason, f.create_time FROM tb_view_record f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.sales_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_house h ON f.house_id = h.id WHERE f.customer_id = #{customerId} AND f.status = 1 AND f.is_deleted = 0 AND f.view_time >= NOW() ORDER BY f.view_time ASC
